G

GameController - Class in com.example.miniproyecto2.controller
JavaFX controller for the main Sudoku game view.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto2.controller.GameController
 
GameHolder() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto2.view.GameStage.GameHolder
 
GameStage - Class in com.example.miniproyecto2.view
Singleton class that represents the main application window (Stage) in JavaFX.
GameStage() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyecto2.view.GameStage
Private constructor for the GameStage singleton.
GameStage.GameHolder - Class in com.example.miniproyecto2.view
Holder for the lazy-initialized singleton instance (initialization-on-demand holder idiom).
getButtonAt(int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.controller.GameController
Retrieves the button located at a specific column and row in the grid.
getButtonData(Button) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.controller.GameController
Extracts cell coordinates from a button's userData.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.model.Sudoku
This function helps to obtain the correct instance (the only instance).
getInstance() - Static method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.view.GameStage
Retrieves the single instance of GameStage (Singleton pattern).
getOriginal(int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.model.AbstractNodeMatrix
Retrieves whether the cell at the given coordinates is part of the original puzzle.
getValue(int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyecto2.model.AbstractNodeMatrix
Retrieves the value stored in the cell at the given coordinates.
getValue(int, int) - Method in interface com.example.miniproyecto2.model.INodeMatrix
 
gridPanel - Variable in class com.example.miniproyecto2.controller.GameController
Main Sudoku grid panel containing all cell buttons.
